# Digital Edu Store

> Premium educational bundle for students in Sri Lanka: Coursera Plus 1-Year access with bonus Canva Edu Pro and LinkedIn Career Premium for LKR 3,000. Instant delivery, legitimate accounts activated on your own email.

Based in Colombo, Sri Lanka. Contact via WhatsApp at +94 78 690 4949.
